rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JAMES J. & ROSELLA C. KENNEDY 1998 REVOCALBLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
rulings.Rulings: continued to january 23, 2019. the response to the objections changes the accounting in a material way by calling a significant number of disbursements "mischaracterized" and providing an entirely different explanation of the payment (for example, disbursements original identified as PGE payments, now called loan payments). an amendment to the accounting must be filed and fully noticed that no only includes the changed schedules, but explains how such "mischaracterizations" could have occurred. in addition, the hearing has been moved to a calendar heard by Judge Stewart. deadline for providing a file stamped copy of the amendment to the petition to the examiner in Room 202 in order to avoid an automatic continuance is noon on Friday, Jnauary 18, 2019.
